drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit properly closed with secure knot

technique_summary: Well-executed task with proper surgeon's knot formation, correct hand switching between throws, and accurate suture placement. Good overall technique demonstrated throughout.
improvement_suggestions: Slightly more precise suture placement to minimize deviation from marks
Consider slightly faster needle loading to improve efficiency
strengths: Excellent knot tying technique with proper surgeon's knot
